---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Parahub
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Use Case

Describe the problem or need this feature would address. What are you trying to accomplish?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples that help explain the feature request.

## Relevant System

Which part of Parahub does this relate to? (e.g., marketplace, governance, transit, map, directory)
